title: Mission to Cairn Installation
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Mission |prev=[[Battle of Bespin (Empire Reborn)|Battle of Bespin]]''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' |conc= |next=[[Battle of Yavin 4 (Empire Reborn)|Battle of Yavin 4]] |image=[[File:Jediheroes.jpg]] |name=Mission to Cairn Installation |conflict=*[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] **[[Empire Reborn campaign]] |objective=Locate the ''[[Doomgiver]]'' |date=[[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' |place=[[Cairn Installation]]; [[Lenico Belt]] |result=[[Kyle Katarn]] gains access to the ''Doomgiver'' |side1=[[Empire Reborn]] |side2=*[[New Jedi Order]] *[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1= |commanders2=[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |ppl1=*[[Desann]] *172 [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] *59 [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officers]] **[[Galak Fyyar]] *44 [[Imperial worker]]s *22 [[Reborn]] *2 [[Shadowtrooper]]s *4 [[Mark 1 droid walker]]s *1 [[All_Terrain_Scout_Transport/Legends|AT-ST walker]] |ppl2=*2 [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] **[[Kyle Katarn]] **Luke Skywalker |ppl3= |ppl4= |casual1=*Many Stormtroopers *Many Imperial officers *Many Reborn *2 Shadowtroopers *4 Mark 1 droid walkers *1 AT-ST |casual2=None |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|They're smuggling something called "Cortosis" here from Bespin."
"Damn, that's not good."
"Why?"
"Well, Cortosis is a rare mineral that resists lightsabers."
"Great.|Kyle Katarn and Luke Skywalker|audio=CortosisSmuggling.flac|}} The '''Mission to Cairn Installation''' was carried out by the [[New Jedi Order]] against the [[Empire Reborn]]. ==Mission== ===Build-up=== {{Quote|That…(cough)...hauler…will take you to our base in the Lenico Belt. That's where Galak's ship, the Doomgiver, is docked; it's also where he's keeping your woman for further interrogations.|Tavion Axmis being force choked and interrogated by Kyle Katarn|audio=DoomgiverLocation.flac|}} After [[Battle of Bespin (Empire Reborn)|defeating]] [[Tavion Axmis]] on [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] and interrogating her, [[Kyle Katarn]] learned that the [[Cairn Installation]] was the dock of Fyyar's ship, ''[[Doomgiver]]'', and that [[Jan Ors]] could be found onboard. Boarding an [[1-138|automated ore hauler]], Katarn hyperspaced from Bespin and was eventually able to sneak into the facility's main convoy hangar bay 1. ===Mission=== Once inside, Katarn silently watched as the vessel he had sneaked in on begin to unload slabs of [[Cortosis/Legends|Cortosis]]. After it had finished, Katarn made his way through a corridor, but when he opened a door leading to another hangar, he was confronted by a stormtrooper. Luckily, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], who was also looking for [[Desann]], leaped out from his hiding place and slew the trooper. He informed Katarn that he had led a small task force of Jedi to the [[Valley of the Jedi]], and [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] had chased away the Remnant vessels, but they did not know how many of Desann's Reborn had been made before they got there. When Katarn informed him of the smuggling of cortosis from Nar Shaddaa, Skywalker was deeply concerned and informed Katarn of cortosis's lightsaber-deflecting properties. After fighting back to back against a squad of [[Reborn]], Katarn and Skywalker split up to search for Desann, and the ''Doomgiver''. [[File:Pwnd2.jpg|thumb|left|[[Kyle Katarn]] deactivates one of the Cairn Installation hangar bay shields causing several [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] to be sucked into the vacuum of space.]] Katarn's journey through the base was perilous, as he frequently encountered bottomless pits and numerous squads of Reborn and [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]]. After disabling the drop ship factory, Katarn was forced to head into the deadly reactor shafts of the facility. Even those who worked in these reactors died there, as Katarn stumbled upon the corpse of an unwary Imperial worker. [[File:LukeconfrontsDesann.jpg|thumb|right|210px|[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] confronts [[Desann]]]] Emerging unscathed from the reactor, Katarn was able to defeat a [[Shadowtrooper]] at the same time, while avoiding detection by security patrols in the ''Doomgiver''{{'s}} docking bay. Eventually, he was able to board the ''Doomgiver'', moments before it began its journey to [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. From the command bridge, Katarn watched as Desann and Skywalker fought a fierce duel. The fight ended when Skywalker appeared to be crushed beneath rubble, and Desann fled onto the ''Doomgiver'' as it launched. However, Skywalker managed to evade the rubble and watches the ''Doomgiver'' launch. ==Behind the scenes== In the ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' game, when Katarn is about to enter the hangar in ''Cairn Bay'', some stormtroopers can be heard discussing [[Mission to Kejim|the events at Kejim]]. One says that a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] (Kyle Katarn) killed nearly everyone there. Since Katarn was not yet reconnected with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] or in possession of a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] at that point, this is most likely an in-game rumor in motion amongst the stormtroopers or just a continuity error. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW Reborn}} {{Interlang |es=Misión a la Instalación Cairn }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Cairn Installation, Mission to}} [[Category:Battles of the Empire Reborn campaign]] [[Category:Battles of the Lenico Belt]]
